_comment: Verification overrides keyed by issuer CIK (leading zeros stripped). is_target=false DROPS the candidate (authoritative, beats name/type heuristics); is_target=true KEEPS and promotes it; a CIK absent here is treated as 'unverified - needs review'. Written by web/agent verification of the actual manager's business.
